title: Create Activity Log
description: Creates a log entry containing the Fitbit user's activity or private custom activity.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: activityId
parameters.description: This is the activity ID of the activity, directory activity or intensity level activity. If you pass directory activity id, Fitbit calculates and substitutes it with the corresponding intensity level activity ID based on the specified distance and/or duration. Either activityId or activityName must be provided.

parameters.name: activityName
parameters.description: Custom activity name. Either activityId or activityName must be provided.

parameters.name: manualCalories
parameters.description: Calories burned, specified manually. Request with activityName parameter, otherwise optional

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Activity start time. Hours and minutes in the format HH:mm.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Log entry date in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: distance
parameters.description: Distance; required for logging directory activity. In the format X.XX and in the selected distanceUnit or in the unit system that corresponds to the Accept-Language header provided.

parameters.name: distanceUnit
parameters.description: Distance measurement unit. See Units for acceptable values. "Steps" may be used as a distanceUnits value when the activity is either "Walking" (activityId=90013) or "Running" (activityId=90009).

response_fields.name: activityLog : activityParentId
response_fields.description: The ID of the top level ("parent") activity.

response_fields.name: activityLog : activityParentName
response_fields.description: The name of the top level ("parent") activity.

response_fields.name: activityLog : distance
response_fields.description: The distance traveled during the recorded activity in the unit system corresponding to the Accept-Language header.

response_fields.name: activityLog : duration
response_fields.description: The length of time in milliseconds.

response_fields.name: activityLog : hasStartTime
response_fields.description: Specifies if the activity was entered with a start time. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: activityLog : isFavorite
response_fields.description: Specifies if activity is listed as a user's favorite. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: activityLog : lastModified
response_fields.description: The timestamp the activity was entered in the format yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.fff.

response_fields.name: activityLog : name
response_fields.description: The name of the activity log.

response_fields.name: activityLog : startTime
response_fields.description: The start time the activity occurred.

response_fields.name: activityLog : steps
response_fields.description: The number of steps taken during the activity.

activityLog.description: Walking less than 2 mph, strolling very slowly
activityLog.name: Walk
